w:r.w:t: Goal: Match core usability of Odoo
“You will run out of stock in 5 days”
This is what makes users LOVE the system
John Ltd ABC Shop XYZ Co Done deal
RFQ → Purchase Order → Receipt → Vendor Bill → Payment
Show status visually (like a progress bar)
Employee profile page (with tabs like Odoo)
Event-driven architecture (you already partly have this with
your current backend → frontend screens exactly
